footer.tagline: A secure two-sided marketplace where users complete verified tasks and businesses launch measurable growth campaigns.
footer.builtFor: Built for secure payouts, moderation, and campaign analytics.

landing.heroSubtitle: EarnHub is a secure two-sided marketplace where users complete verified tasks and businesses launch measurable growth campaigns.

howItWorksSteps: Pick a verified task and follow the instructions.
Submit proof and track your status in real time.
Get approved and receive wallet credits quickly.
forBusinessesSteps: Fund your wallet, set budget and reward per task.
Receive moderated submissions with fraud signals.
Track ROI with live analytics and export-ready reports.

items.title: Secure By Design
items.body: Wallet ledger, moderation pipeline, and atomic reward settlement for trust at scale.

items.title: Fast Campaign Launch
items.body: Fund your business wallet, create campaigns, and start receiving submissions in minutes.

items.title: Actionable Growth
items.body: Monitor campaign flow, approvals, and platform revenue from your analytics dashboards.

items.body: We show only anonymized activity and verified submissions to protect privacy.

items.body: Clear commission breakdowns and funding fees so you know exactly where budgets go.

cta.title: Ready to start earning?
cta.body: Join thousands of users completing verified tasks every week.

offlineInvite.title: Print this QR and let anyone join EarnHub in one scan.
offlineInvite.body: Designed for posters, flyers, business cards, and offline campaigns. The code opens the main home page directly so new users can land on the platform without typing the address.
offlineInvite.qrAlt: QR code linking to the EarnHub homepage

about.title: About EarnHub
about.description: EarnHub is a trusted task marketplace where businesses run measurable campaigns and users earn from verified work.

build.title: What We Build
build.body: We provide a two-sided system: businesses launch campaign tasks, and users submit proof of completion. Every submission flows through moderation before financial settlement.

trust.title: How Trust Is Maintained
bullets: Wallet ledger transparency for credits, debits, and payouts
Fraud and abuse checks before approvals

direction.title: Our Product Direction
direction.body: EarnHub is designed as a long-term growth platform, not a one-time gig board. We focus on reliable payouts, clear business ROI, and operational compliance from day one.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers about accounts, approvals, payouts, campaign workflow, and platform trust.

items.a: EarnHub is a two-sided marketplace where businesses launch campaigns and users earn by completing verified tasks.
Rewards are credited after manager/admin approval according to the moderation workflow and campaign rules.
Most withdrawal requests are processed within 3 to 5 business days, subject to fraud and compliance checks.
Business accounts may require KYC approval before campaign creation and budget deployment.
We do not sell personal data. Data sharing is limited to essential service providers and legal/regulatory obligations.

contact.title: Contact EarnHub
contact.description: For account support, payment concerns, compliance questions, or dispute escalation, contact our team.
contact.supportResponse: Typical first response: 24 to 48 business hours.
contact.hoursNote: Critical payout or security incidents are prioritized.

overview.title: User Overview
overview.noNotifications: No notifications yet. Approval and withdrawal updates will appear here.
overview.noActivity: No activity yet. Complete a task or request a withdrawal to populate the timeline.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.noTransactions: No wallet transactions yet. Approved rewards and withdrawals will show here.

withdrawals.title: Withdrawals
withdrawals.ruleOnePending: Only one pending withdrawal request is allowed at a time.
withdrawals.ruleAdminReview: Admin reviews determine approval or rejection.
withdrawals.ruleEmergency: Emergency withdrawals below the minimum are allowed 2 times per month.

withdrawRequest.title: Request Withdrawal
withdrawRequest.upiIdPlaceholder: Enter UPI ID or Mobile Number
withdrawRequest.upiNamePlaceholder: Enter UPI Name or Banking Name
withdrawRequest.helper: Amounts below INR {amount} are treated as emergency withdrawals and are limited to 2 per month.

submissions.title: Track each review stage clearly
submissions.empty: No submissions match the current filters.
submissions.noReason: No structured rejection reason is stored yet for this submission. Only rejection status is available.

tasks.title: Live Campaigns
tasks.blocked: You already used your one allowed submission for this campaign.

taskDetail.noVariants: No task detail variants were added for this campaign. Use the task description and link carefully.
taskDetail.assignmentBody: This detail refreshes automatically as slots are taken and released. If unique task details run out before campaign slots are full, the system reuses available details from the same pool.
taskDetail.statusAllOccupied: All campaign slots are currently occupied.
taskDetail.statusNotAccepting: This campaign is not accepting submissions right now.
taskDetail.proofWarning: Submit genuine proof only. Invalid or copied proof can be rejected and may trigger fraud review.
taskDetail.proofLinkPlaceholder: Paste the proof URL if this task needs a link
taskDetail.proofDetailsPlaceholder: Add submission details, notes, or text proof
taskDetail.blocked: You have already submitted once for this campaign. Further submissions are disabled by admin.
taskDetail.addProof: Add a proof link or proof text before submitting.

referrals.title: Coins and referrals
referrals.noInvites: No referrals yet. Share your code to start earning coins.
